summary: Tested breadcrumb navigation in provider sections (Contracts, Invoices, Notes, Appointments). Found and FIXED a bug where the 'Clients' breadcrumb link in ProviderContracts.tsx threw 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading clients)' error. All breadcrumb navigation now works correctly.

fixed_issues.issue: Breadcrumb 'Clients' link caused error: 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading clients)' - ContractsConfig was missing routes.clients property
fixed_issues.fix: Added routes: { clients: string } to ContractsConfig interface and both DOULA_CONTRACTS_CONFIG and MIDWIFE_CONTRACTS_CONFIG in contractsConfig.ts

test_results.dashboard_display: PASS - Shows Hello Sarah, stats (0 Active Clients, 1 Upcoming Appts, 0 Pending Contracts, 0 Pending Invoices), Quick Actions
test_results.clients_list: PASS - Shows Emma Johnson with Contract Sent status

context_for_next_testing_agent: All breadcrumb navigation features are working correctly. The bug fix added routes.clients to the ContractsConfig interface. Login button requires mouse position click due to React Native TouchableOpacity behavior on web.
known_issues: Dashboard shows 0 Active Clients but there is 1 client (Emma Johnson) - known bug to be fixed after UI tasks
Login button click requires special handling (mouse position click) due to React Native TouchableOpacity on web
